sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54212" key="kata/kollos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάκολλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n54212.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixed with glue</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέλαν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:31:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31.10</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
